purpose: Local deterministic budgets for package size and startup/import smoke. Ceilings are intentionally explicit so regressions are visible before publish or handoff.

calibrationPolicy.tighteningRule: After calibrationPolicy.requiredSuccessfulRuns successful runs on a clean built tree, set each ceiling to the greater of actual * 1.35 or actual + the smallest practical fixed buffer.

fileSize.rationale: SDK root import should remain a small wrapper over generated code, not a bundled application.
CJS root import should stay close to ESM size after dual-build emit.
CLI startup entrypoint should remain lightweight and command-dispatch oriented.
MCP stdio entrypoint should not absorb generated SDK internals or fixture data.

timing.name: sdk-esm-import
timing.rationale: A consumer should be able to import the SDK root without expensive runtime setup.

timing.name: cli-version
timing.rationale: The CLI should print version/help quickly before any Clockify network setup.

timing.name: mcp-tools-list
timing.rationale: MCP clients should be able to discover the 105-tool surface quickly on local stdio startup.
